message:
test(proptest): add 20 property tests for simulation coverage gaps

Add SM-24 through SM-43 covering Scenario.from_yaml parsing,
validate() rejection of duplicate panes/unknown pane refs/out-of-order
events/empty metadata keys+values/empty Typing content, valid scenario
acceptance, reproducibility_key format and metadata usage, ScenarioEvent
serialization, Expectation serde for Event/Contains/Workflow variants,
ResizeTimelineStageSummary serde, stage_summary coverage and percentile
ordering invariant, ScenarioPane defaults from YAML, SandboxCommand
serialization, and from_yaml resilience to invalid input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
